name: Beef Souvlaki with Tzatziki Sauce (Kebabs)
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Beef or lamb cut into 1-inch cubes (I use lamb)
2 medium Green peppers, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the meat and marinate on the first day.
- Place meat in a bowl.
- In a small bowl, combine black pepper, garlic, and oregano. Sprinkle mixture over meat. Mix well to coat.
- In a blender, combine lemon juice and olive oil and blend. Pour over meat, cover, and refrigerate overnight.
2. Prepare the veggies on the second day.
- Brush onions and green peppers with olive oil. Sprinkle with salt and pepper to taste.
- Thread meat and veggies (alternating) onto skewers.
3. Grill the kebabs, being careful not to overcook them. Use any remaining marinade while cooking.
4. Before serving, sprinkle with salt and fresh lemon juice.
